sources.summary: As John Leguizamo joined the cast of Christopher Nolan s The Odyssey, he found himself immersed in the role in one major way. sources.summary: Richard Gadd, change your flight plans. The creator and star of HBO Max’s “Half Man” wound up with the series’ only Emmy nomination this year — via his supporting actor in a limited/anthology series or movie nod. sources.summary: The best classic Hollywood podcast going will now turn to forgotten singer/actress Holman, once an on-and-off lover of another bisexual, the tragically fated Montgomery Clift.
